codeReview.summary: The replay correctly recreates the remaining upstream PR #2896 delta: ordered rename-before-prefix prepare helper, ordered prefix-strip-before-reverse restore helpers, nested tool_reference restoration in reverseRemapOAuthToolNames, and executor-path integration. All three executor call sites (Execute, ExecuteStream passthrough, ExecuteStream translated) plus CountTokens now use the centralized prepare/restore flow. Early-return guards added to both reverse functions for empty dynReverse maps. Seven targeted regression tests cover prefix ordering, tool_reference restoration in both non-stream and SSE paths, and full Execute/ExecuteStream/CountTokens round-trip wiring. All tests pass. Diff is bounded to claude_executor.go and claude_executor_test.go only.

issues.description: reverseRemapOAuthToolNamesFromStreamLine has a redundant nil check inside resolveOrigName (dynReverse == nil) that can never be true since the function already early-returns when len(dynReverse) == 0, and a nil map also has len 0. Same pattern exists in reverseRemapOAuthToolNames at line 1295. This is pre-existing, not introduced by this replay, so it is non-blocking.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The pr-replay-worker skill references .factory/init.sh as a shell script and a 'file-group-reviewer' subagent type. On Windows, neither is available (no sh, no such subagent). The worker correctly substituted equivalent commands. The skill procedure should note Windows compatibility requirements or provide Windows-equivalent commands.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.deviations lists two deviations: ran 'go mod download' directly instead of init.sh, and used 'worker' subagent instead of 'file-group-reviewer'. Both were justified substitutions.

VAL-PR2896-001.evidence: TestRestoreClaudeOAuthToolNamesFromResponse_RestoresToolReferencesAfterStrippingPrefix verifies non-stream response restoration preserves TitleCase 'Bash' and restores lowercase 'glob' and 'task_create'. TestClaudeExecutor_Execute_OAuthToolNamesRoundTripPreservesToolReferences confirms end-to-end non-stream Execute path preserves original client casing for tool_use blocks (content.0.name='Bash', content.1.name='glob').

VAL-PR2896-002.evidence: TestRestoreClaudeOAuthToolNamesFromStreamLine_RestoresToolReferencesAfterStrippingPrefix verifies SSE line restoration preserves 'Bash' and restores 'glob' for tool_use and tool_reference content blocks. TestClaudeExecutor_ExecuteStream_OAuthToolNamesRoundTrip_Passthrough confirms end-to-end SSE passthrough path restores mixed-case names correctly.

VAL-PR2896-003.evidence: TestPrepareClaudeOAuthToolNamesForUpstream_PrefixesOnlyAfterRenames verifies dynReverse does NOT contain 'Bash' (a TitleCase-only tool), confirming TitleCase-only inputs are a no-op on reverse remap. The restore functions' empty-dynReverse early-return guards also ensure no-op behavior when no renames occurred.

VAL-PR2896-004.evidence: TestPrepareClaudeOAuthToolNamesForUpstream_PrefixesOnlyAfterRenames verifies dynReverse['Glob']='glob' and dynReverse['TaskCreate']='task_create', confirming lowercase and snake_case renames round-trip correctly through the per-request reverse map.

VAL-PR2896-005.evidence: TestPrepareClaudeOAuthToolNamesForUpstream_PrefixesOnlyAfterRenames verifies the prefix is applied AFTER rename (tools.0.name='proxy_Bash', tools.1.name='proxy_Glob'), and TestRestoreClaudeOAuthToolNamesFromResponse_RestoresToolReferencesAfterStrippingPrefix confirms prefixes are stripped BEFORE reverse remap, preserving tool identity in both directions.

VAL-PR2896-006.evidence: TestClaudeExecutor_Execute_OAuthToolNamesRoundTripPreservesToolReferences covers non-stream Execute path. TestClaudeExecutor_ExecuteStream_OAuthToolNamesRoundTrip_Passthrough covers direct SSE passthrough path. TestClaudeExecutor_ExecuteStream_OAuthToolNamesRoundTrip_Translated covers the format-translation streaming path. All three pass.

VAL-PR2896-007.evidence: git diff --stat shows exactly 2 files changed: internal/runtime/executor/claude_executor.go and internal/runtime/executor/claude_executor_test.go. No changes outside the Claude executor slice.

VAL-PR2896-008.evidence: TestRestoreClaudeOAuthToolNamesFromResponse_RestoresToolReferencesAfterStrippingPrefix verifies tool_reference at content.2.tool_name restored to 'glob', and nested tool_reference inside tool_result at content.3.content.0.tool_name restored to 'task_create'. TestRestoreClaudeOAuthToolNamesFromStreamLine also verifies tool_reference SSE blocks. reverseRemapOAuthToolNames has explicit case 'tool_result' handling at line 1323 for nested tool_reference payloads.

summary: PASS. The replay faithfully recreates the remaining upstream PR #2896 delta with correct ordered prepare/restore helpers, nested tool_reference restoration, and comprehensive regression tests covering all four executor call sites. Scope is tightly bounded to the Claude executor slice (2 files). All 7 new tests pass alongside existing tests. One non-blocking observation about a pre-existing redundant nil check in resolveOrigName. The implementation correctly handles the core bug: per-request reverse mapping ensures mixed-case client tool names (like Amp CLI's Bash+glob) round-trip correctly without corrupting TitleCase tools.
